name: io.github.kaitoInfra/twitterapi-io-mcp-server
description: Official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for twitterapi.io — Twitter/X data access (search tweets, users, followers, replies, trends) via Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, or any MCP-compatible client.

environmentVariables.name: TWITTERAPI_IO_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your twitterapi.io API key — get from https://twitterapi.io dashboard
